testcase.name: test_09_existing_multi_specialty_user

failure.message: AssertionError: User should have specialty_ids assert ('specialty_ids' in {'access_tier_id': None, 'access_tier_name': None, 'account_type': 'Internal Staff', 'active': True, ...} or 0 > 0) + where 0 = len([]) + where [] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa271b06cf00>('specialty_ids', []) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa271b06cf00> = {'access_tier_id': None, 'access_tier_name': None, 'account_type': 'Internal Staff', 'active': True, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_multi_specialty_support.py:312: in test_09_existing_multi_specialty_user assert "specialty_ids" in user or len(user.get("specialty_ids", [])) > 0, "User should have specialty_ids" E AssertionError: User should have specialty_ids E assert ('specialty_ids' in {'access_tier_id': None, 'access_tier_name': None, 'account_type': 'Internal Staff', 'active': True, ...} or 0 > 0) E + where 0 = len([]) E + where [] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa271b06cf00>('specialty_ids', []) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa271b06cf00> = {'access_tier_id': None, 'access_tier_name': None, 'account_type': 'Internal Staff', 'active': True, ...}.get
